name: Sensitive File Shared with a Guest User or Group
notes:
This rule triggers when a sensitive file is shared with a guest user or group. The Files in Sensitive Directories reference set is populated by the Files in Sensitive File Directories rule, which uses the Sensitive Directories reference set. 

Note: The Sensitive Directories and Guest Login Users reference sets must be populated.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events
when any of Target User Area (custom) are contained in any of Guest Login Users - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
TD_list: APPLY Sensitive File Shared with a Guest User or Group on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events
AND when any of Target User Area (custom) are contained in any of Guest Login Users - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
RED_list: Event name: Sensitive File Shared with a Guest User or Group
Event description: Detected sensitive file shared with a guest user or group
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
